compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md and project docs to reflect planning intelligence capabilities
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Update existing project documentation to reflect the new brainstorm and preplanning capabilities added by epic dso-d63r:

1. **CLAUDE.md**: Update architecture section and quick reference to document:
   - Brainstorm Step 2.6 (Web Research Phase) with bright-line triggers
   - Brainstorm Step 2.75 (Scenario Analysis) with red/blue team prompts and complexity scaling
   - Brainstorm Step 4 (Approval Gate) with 4-option gate and planning-intelligence log
   - Preplanning Phase 3.5 (Story-Level Research) with trigger conditions and Research Notes
2. **Any other existing docs** that reference brainstorm or preplanning workflow — update to reflect new phases
3. Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting

test-exempt: static asset only (documentation markdown, no conditional logic, no executable code)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions brainstorm research phase
  Verify: grep -qi 'research phase\|web research\|Step 2.6' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions brainstorm scenario analysis
  Verify: grep -qi 'scenario analysis\|Step 2.75' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions brainstorm approval gate
  Verify: grep -qi 'approval gate\|4-option' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions preplanning story-level research
  Verify: grep -qi 'story.*level.*research\|Phase 3.5' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] No broken internal references in CLAUDE.md
  Verify: grep -oE 'plugins/dso/[^ )`"]+' CLAUDE.md | head -20 | while read p; do test -e "$p" || echo "MISSING: $p"; done | grep -c MISSING | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (none required — docs only) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Verified — all 4 ACs pass, no broken internal references ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
